title: cardamine hirsuta var. flexuosa
intro: Cardamine hirsuta var. flexuosa, also known as hairy bittercress, is a perennial plant species in the family Brassicaceae, characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues and soothe skin irritations. The health benefits of hairy bittercress include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and promote digestion, making it a valuable herb in natural remedies. Hairy bittercress can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used fresh in salads or as a garnish.
